_note: FINAL goals set (Fable expert review + Claude compliance gate-check, user-approved with a 7-cycle budget). NOT yet frozen — freeze happens after the acceptance suite is authored (honest all-failing baseline). Harness contract (frozen with the goals): commands are shell-portable, deterministic, LLM-free (StubAgent + respx + recorded fixtures; NO live API; NO tesseract binary needed — OCR via recorded fixture tokens behind an OCR Protocol stub). Entry points self-sync agent/.venv via `uv pip install` on import-probe failure. Exit-code contract: 0 + bare number (last stdout line) = measured; 2 = usage error; 3 = ENVIRONMENT ERROR (stale venv, missing dep/binary, empty scan corpus, failed scanner self-proof) with NO number, so env problems never read as a regression. phi_check.py exits 3 unless the corpus is non-empty with the expected event families AND a planted-PHI self-proof flags first. With the 7-cycle budget, F4b (medical_problem+allergy write-back) is PROMOTED to a frozen goal (feat_writeback), and the hand-rolled status page is PROMOTED back as a feat_api criterion. Feature targets equal the criteria counts in backlog.md; 52 criteria total across 8 feature metrics.

metrics.name: Week-2 acceptance pass rate (%) over all feature suites
Existing repo suite pass rate (%) — agent/tests + agent/evals regression guard
PHI occurrences in captured logs/traces/eval artifacts (guarded scanner + self-proof)
Verification: citation union + repo CRUD + document/guideline grounding, fail-closed
Ingestion: settings/pricing + doc pipeline (stub OCR) + upload_document to OpenEMR
Write-back: physician-confirmed medical_problem + allergy via propose->confirm gate
Hybrid RAG: corpus ingest + FTS/pgvector + RRF + rerank fallback + de-identified egress
Graph: supervisor + 2 workers + critic, logged handoffs, NESTED spans, 7-key observability fields
API: /v1/documents + evidence + OpenAPI-sync + graded /ready + JSON logging + SLO artifact + status page + packaging
Frontend: build + vitest infra + ProvenanceChip variants + bbox overlay geometry + upload + citation adapter
Eval gate: 50-case/5-rubric golden set + >5% regression blocking + self-proof + git-hook/GitLab-CI wiring
